issue.body:
> **Period:** 2026-05-02 → 2026-06-01 | **Generated:** 2026-06-01

---

## 🏆 Highlights

- **seiton** shipped **5 releases** (v0.9.13–v0.9.17) with 20+ merged PRs — by far the most active project this month.
- **SkiaSharp.QrCode** has an open feature request for a browser WASM playground.
- Dependency automation (Dependabot / github-actions bot) is healthy across all active repos.

---

## 📦 Active Repositories (30-day window)

| Repository | Stars | Lang | Activity |
|---|---|---|---|
| [seiton](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton) | 1 | C# | 🔥 20 PRs merged, 5 releases, 1 open PR |
| [githubactions-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab) | 55 | Go | 3 dep-bump PRs merged |
| [SkiaSharp.QrCode](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode) | 232 | C# | 2 open issues (feature + announcement) |
| [scoop-bucket](https://github.com/guitarrapc/scoop-bucket) | 2 | — | Auto-updated seiton + opa + chrome manifests |
| [csharp-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/csharp-lab) | 3 | C# | 2 automated GitHub-IP update PRs |
| [bash-styleguide](https://github.com/guitarrapc/bash-styleguide) | 2 | — | Dep bumps (hono, fast-uri) + textlint cleanup |
| [dotfiles-win](https://github.com/guitarrapc/dotfiles-win) | 2 | PS | 3 commits (docs, code-review skill, chore) |
| [PowerShellUtil](https://github.com/guitarrapc/PowerShellUtil) | 155 | PS | CI update only (no new PRs/issues) |
| [blog](https://github.com/guitarrapc/blog) | 1 | HTML | 2 open issues (stale) |
| [hatenablog-theme-codefocus](https://github.com/guitarrapc/hatenablog-theme-codefocus) | 4 | JS | 1 open issue (stale) |
| [SortAlgorithms](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SortAlgorithms) | 1 | C# | CI update only |
| [ClrProfiler](https://github.com/guitarrapc/ClrProfiler) | 9 | C# | CI update only |
| [dotfileslinker-go](https://github.com/guitarrapc/dotfileslinker-go) | 0 | Go | CI update only |
| [AgonesSdkCsharp](https://github.com/guitarrapc/AgonesSdkCsharp) | 3 | C# | CI update only |
| [docker-jmeter-gui](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-jmeter-gui) | 12 | Dockerfile | CI update only |
| [docker-lab](https://github.com/guitarrapc/docker-lab) | 1 | C# | 1 open issue (stale) |

---

## 🚀 seiton — Release Summary

| Release | Date | Notable Changes |
|---|---|---|
| [v0.9.17](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.17) | 2026-05-29 | `seiton install --skills` for AI agent skill files; playground severity UX; bot-conditions false positive fixes |
| [v0.9.16](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.16) | 2026-05-28 | githubactions-lab feedback integration; concurrency `queue` key support; folded-scalar fix corruption fix |
| [v0.9.15](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.15) | 2026-05-25 | Expression validation boundary (parser vs linter); CA2000 analysis; fix-conflict test coverage |
| [v0.9.14](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.14) | 2026-05-24 | Breaking: removed `extend` intermediate key; runner-no-latest fix-mapping; overlapping-edits fix; docs alignment |
| [v0.9.13](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/releases/tag/v0.9.13) | 2026-05-20 | Homebrew release flow fix (GitHub App token) |

**Open PR:** [#111 feat(cli): improve config UX with verbose levels, summary metadata, and compound...](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/111) — needs review/merge.

---

## 🐛 Open Issues

### seiton
No open issues.

### SkiaSharp.QrCode
- [#301 Create GitHub Pages Playground with SkiaSharp.QrCode WASM](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/301) — feature request (2026-05-20)
- [#266 Introduction of `QRCodeImageBuilder` and Deprecation of `QrCode` class](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/266) — announcement/tracking (open since 2025-10-24)

### githubactions-lab
- [#7](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/7) / [#8](https://github.com/guitarrapc/githubactions-lab/issues/8) — long-running lab/playground issues (stale, intentional)

---

## 🔍 Suspicious / Notable Observations

- **No anomalies detected.** All bot-authored commits and PRs are from recognized actors: `github-actions[bot]`, `dependabot[bot]`.
- `csharp-lab` auto-updates GitHub IP allowlists via a scheduled workflow — expected behaviour.
- `scoop-bucket` tracks seiton releases automatically — working correctly.
- **PowerShellUtil** (155 ⭐) shows only CI activity with no new user-facing changes. Given its popularity, consider checking for stale community issues.
- **SkiaSharp.QrCode** (232 ⭐) has 4 integrity-filtered issues (not readable by this report pipeline) — a manual review of issues [#292](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/292), [#294](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/294), [#296](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/296), [#299](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/299) is recommended.

---

## ✅ Actionable Next Steps

1. **seiton** — Review and merge open PR [#111](https://github.com/guitarrapc/seiton/pull/111) (CLI verbose levels & summary metadata).
2. **SkiaSharp.QrCode** — Manually review issues #292, #294, #296, #299 (not accessible via automation). Triage [#301 WASM playground](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/301) for roadmap inclusion. Close or migrate [#266 announcement](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/issues/266) if `QRCodeImageBuilder` migration is complete in 0.9.x.
3. **PowerShellUtil** — Review open issue backlog; add a stale-bot label or close if resolved.
4. **githubactions-lab** — 3 dependabot PRs merged; dependency health is good. Consider closing stale playground issues #7 and #8 if no longer needed.
5. **seiton `extend` key removal (v0.9.14 breaking change)** — Ensure downstream consumers and docs are updated if any external users rely on the old config format.




> [!NOTE]
> <details>
> <summary>🔒 Integrity filter blocked 5 items</summary>
>
> The following items were blocked because they don't meet the GitHub integrity level.
>
> - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#299 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved".
> - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#296 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved".
> - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#294 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved".
> - guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode#292 `list_issues`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved".
> - [#302](https://github.com/guitarrapc/SkiaSharp.QrCode/pull/302) `list_pull_requests`: has lower integrity than agent requires. The agent cannot read data with integrity below "approved".
>
> To allow these resources, lower `min-integrity` in your GitHub frontmatter:
>
> ```yaml
> tools:
>   github:
>     min-integrity: approved  # merged | approved | unapproved | none
> ```
>
> </details>
